howto_rules: Inherit from CaseOracleXxxBase classes for each phase
Use find_repo_root pattern with RepoRootLocatedCheck fallback
All subprocess calls must have explicit timeout
Use typed placeholders for unknown ref values
example_patterns: find_repo_root scanning workspace and immediate children
load_json_file helper for safe JSON loading

borrowed_structure.artifact_build.py: verify/command mode pattern from egwalker, checking pip packages installed
borrowed_structure.benchmark_prep.py: FilesystemPathCheck for data directories from egwalker
borrowed_structure.experiment_runs.py: FilesystemPathCheck for output CSV files, verify simulation outputs exist

artifact_specific_adaptations: No compiled build artifacts - Python-only project with pip install
Build phase checks that setup.sh was run (venv, pip packages, ray)
Benchmark prep checks data directory and PCS config files exist
Experiment runs verifies CSV output files from simulation scripts
Toy example produces CSVs in new_data/ directory
Figure scripts produce .pkl files in new_data/
Jupyter notebooks are interactive - skip notebook execution checks
reproduce.py is interactive with GUI - cannot verify non-interactively
Simulation scripts have long runtimes, use verify mode by default
build_steps: Verify setup.sh has been run: requirements installed, ray importable
benchmark_assets: simulation/ directory with sim.py and utils/

experiment_outputs.toy_example: new_data/ CSV files for FIFO, SRSF, PCS variants on themis1
experiment_outputs.workload2: new_data/ CSV files for traces 0e4a51, ee9e8c
experiment_outputs.workload3: new_data/ CSV files for gavel trace

plan_summary: PCS is a simulation-based GPU scheduler evaluation. Environment requires Python 3.10+ with pip packages. No compilation needed. Experiments run simulations producing CSV and PKL output files. Checks verify environment, package installation, data assets, and simulation output existence.

step_coverage.env-002: Covered by artifact_build phase (verify pip packages installed)
step_coverage.run-002: FilesystemPathCheck for FIFO_toy_result.csv (optional, only if single sim was run)
step_coverage.run-004: FilesystemPathCheck for new_data/ CSV files from toy example
step_coverage.run-005: FilesystemPathCheck for new_data/ CSV files from workload2
step_coverage.run-007: FilesystemPathCheck for new_data/ CSV files from workload3

step_gaps.run-001: Jupyter notebook regenerate_plots.ipynb is interactive, cannot verify non-interactively; checked notebook file existence instead
step_gaps.run-003: Summary statistics output is stdout-only, no persistent file to check; checked result_summary.py script existence instead
step_gaps.run-006: Jupyter notebook figure7_plot.ipynb is interactive, cannot verify non-interactively; checked notebook file existence instead
step_gaps.run-008: Jupyter notebook figure8_plot.ipynb is interactive, cannot verify non-interactively; checked notebook file existence instead
step_gaps.run-010: Jupyter notebook figure9a_plot.ipynb is interactive, cannot verify non-interactively; checked notebook file existence instead
step_gaps.run-012: Jupyter notebook figure10_plot.ipynb is interactive, cannot verify non-interactively; checked notebook file existence instead
step_gaps.run-013: reproduce.py is interactive with GUI (Pareto front), cannot verify non-interactively; checked script existence instead

step_augmentations.aug-001: Added check for simulation/ directory existence in benchmark_prep
step_augmentations.aug-002: Added check for data/PCS_configs/ directory existence in benchmark_prep
step_augmentations.aug-003: Added check for requirements.txt existence in benchmark_prep
step_augmentations.aug-004: Added check for key Python packages importable (numpy, pandas, scipy, ray, matplotlib, seaborn) in artifact_build
step_augmentations.aug-005: Added NonEmptyFileCheck for CSV and PKL output files to verify they have content
step_augmentations.aug-006: Added notebook file existence checks for gap steps (run-001, run-006, run-008, run-010, run-012)
step_augmentations.aug-007: Added reproduce.py and result_summary.py script existence checks for gap steps (run-003, run-013)
